lex.botalias.cloudwatchloggrouplogdestin: The Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group where the text and metadata logs are delivered. The log group must exist before you enable logging.

lex.botalias.cloudwatchloggrouplogdestin.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the log group where text and metadata logs are delivered.
The prefix of the log stream name within the log group that you specified.
